function.name: refine_student_profile
function.description: Updates the student's college profile JSON with new information (like new SAT scores, budget changes, or target country changes). Call this whenever the student mentions a change in their background, preferences, or academic standing.

natural_language_update.description: The exact natural language update from the student (e.g. 'I got a 1520 on my SAT and want to add Cornell to my list.')

function.name: run_college_discovery
function.description: Re-scores the college catalog against the student's current profile to generate a new list of target colleges. Call this AFTER the student's profile has been updated to see if their target list changes.

function.name: run_college_crawler
function.description: Executes the Playwright web crawler to download the latest admissions, financial aid, and policy pages from the student's target colleges. Call this AFTER discovery to fetch ground-truth data.

function.name: generate_college_strategy_dashboard
function.description: Runs the LLM extraction and synthesis layers to generate a final strategic recommendation report, then compiles it into a beautiful HTML dashboard. Call this as the final step of the pipeline.
